The '''Battle of Palanhi''' was a battle in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in which the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] deployed their [[Scorpenek annihilator droid/Legends|Scorpenek annihilator droids]] to ensure a victory.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
